creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Is there a changelog for this update?

Your patch does not apply, it looks like it might have been truncated or something:

$ LC_ALL=C git am attachment.cgi\?id\=249157 
Applying: x11-themes/mojave-gtk-themes: update to 2023-08-04
/usr/home/ports/fuz.ports/.git/worktrees/main.ports/rebase-apply/patch:42: trailing whitespace.
   
error: corrupt patch at line 2068
Patch failed at 0001 x11-themes/mojave-gtk-themes: update to 2023-08-04
hint: Use 'git am --show-current-patch=diff' to see the failed patch
When you have resolved this problem, run "git am --continue".
If you prefer to skip this patch, run "git am --skip" instead.
To restore the original branch and stop patching, run "git am --abort".

---

Please check and regenerate the patch using "git am".  Also make sure tabs have not been converted to whitespace or anything like that (this can happen when you copy/paste using Ctrl-C and Ctrl-V instead of uploading the file directly).
